ddls:
CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "problem" TEXT /* Name or description of the challenge */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the challenge (e.g., Forensics, Programming, Reverse Engineering, Cryptography) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Point value assigned to the challenge */,
  "solver" TEXT /* IDs of participants who solved the challenge */,
  "time" TEXT /* Times taken to solve the challenge (in seconds or minutes) by each solver */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition round the challenge belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the challenge is currently active */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Solution to the challenge */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the challenge (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints provided for the challenge */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the challenge (e.g., SQL, Python, C) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the challenge has received */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made to solve the challenge */,
  "solved_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the challenge has been solved */,
  "last_solved_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was last solved */,
  "last_solved_by" TEXT /* ID of the participant who last solved the challenge */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the challenge */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who verified the challenge solution */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the challenge is locked */,
  "solution_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the solution was last verified */,
  "solution_status" TEXT /* Status of the solution (e.g., Pending, Verified, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the participant */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., Participant, Admin, Judge) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the participant is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the round is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the submission belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "submission_content" TEXT /* Content of the submission */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the submission has been verified */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who verified the submission */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was verified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Pending, Verified, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the leaderboard entry belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the participant in the round */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id")
)
